templates.template:
<xf:textboxrow name="options[ipn_urln]" value="{$profile.options.ipn_urln}" autocomplete="text" label="{{ phrase('javasea_nowpayments_ipn_urln') }}" hint="{{ phrase('required') }}"> </xf:textboxrow> <xf:passwordboxrow name="options[api_key]" value="{$profile.options.api_key}" type="password" autocomplete="new-password" label="{{ phrase('javasea_nowpayments_api_key') }}" hint="{{ phrase('required') }}"> </xf:passwordboxrow>
<xf:passwordboxrow name="options[secret_key]" value="{$profile.options.secret_key}" type="password" autocomplete="new-password" label="{{ phrase('javasea_nowpayments_secret_key') }}" hint="{{ phrase('required') }}"> </xf:passwordboxrow>
